entries.notes: All 18 communities live. Platform messaging up 8x since Dec. Rejected OnShift win-back. Active HRIS expansion discussion with COO. Paylocity lag is top unresolved issue. Cayden sole POC after March escalation. Some buildings running high draft-to-published ratios.

platformUsage.summary: All 18 facilities publishing schedules. Messages grew from 1,968 (Dec) to 14,197 (Mar). Call-offs declining (627 Jan -> 402 Mar). Shift invite fill rate very low (0.6-1.5%). Several buildings carrying high draft pipelines.
highlights: High draft pipelines: Chestnut Knoll AL, Lynchburg, Birches at Newtown

customerSentiment.summary: Stable but high-maintenance. Strong champion in Nicolle Williams. Persistent Paylocity integration friction and a March team escalation tempered by loyalty signals and HRIS expansion interest.

actions: Address low publish rates across portfolio (avg 40%) — priority buildings: Traditions of Hanover (0%), KV Douglassville IL (19%), Heritage Green Lynchburg (26%). Schedule 30-min targeted calls to identify blockers.
April check-ins should have happened per March cadence agreement — confirm April meetings occurred and schedule June building rounds now before the window passes.
NPS sitting at 3.0 avg (Chestnut Knoll at 2) — run a 30-min usability check-in at lowest-scoring buildings to address 'gadgets' and usability friction before next NPS cycle.
entries.notes: 18-building post-live portfolio. Position template migration completed April 2026. Heritage exploring Veras HRIS as Paylocity replacement — COO Matt wants fully baked solution, not beta; timeline end-2026 selection / early-2027 implementation. Overtime trending up (+20% Apr MoM at ~12K hrs/mo) despite platform adoption — may present ROI conversation opportunity.

productAdoption.summary: Portfolio-wide weighted publish rate of 39.6% (current month May 6). Strong outliers: Chancellor's Village 96%, Senior Commons 80%, Traditions of Hershey 72%. Laggards: Traditions of Hanover 0%, KV Douglassville IL 19%, Heritage Green Lynchburg 26%. Position template migration in April likely explains suppressed rates at several facilities. Messaging adoption is strong and growing (Dec 1,968 → Apr 7,938 messages/mo).
highlights: Message volume up 7x since December — strong platform engagement
Chancellor's Village at 96% publish rate — top performer
Traditions of Hanover at 0% publish rate — requires immediate attention
Post-migration publish rates expected to normalize in May-June

outcomesRoi.summary: Strong time savings story: 1,567.5 hrs over trailing 12 months across 18 facilities. Overtime is at high absolute levels (~12K hrs/mo) and trending up (+20% MoM in April) — this is both a concern and an ROI conversation opportunity for the HRIS/payroll expansion pitch.

integrationHealth.summary: All 18 communities fully live (stage 1176560694). Integration type not confirmed — flagged as unknown. No high-priority bugs open. One longstanding LOW backlog bug (single Time of Day config, 120+ days open) and one recent Needs Info item around care level editing on integrated job positions.

relationshipStrength.summary: Active engagement cluster in early March (4 meetings in ~2 weeks) covering config migration, HRIS discussion, and portfolio alignment. Agreed bimonthly cadence going forward. Last confirmed meeting March 25 (Gary Miller). No QBR in lookback window. HRIS exploration signals deep strategic relationship with Nicolle Williams as key champion.

touchPoints.name: Heritage Senior Living | Veras Position Updates Discussion

sentimentFriction.summary: Mixed but trending constructive. Heritage is actively exploring Veras HRIS expansion (strong positive signal). NPS at 3.0 avg with consistent '3' scores suggesting 'functional but not delighted' — Chestnut Knoll scoring 2 is a watch item. Nicolle flagged building autonomy causing budget gaming — she's pushing standardization which aligns well with Veras workflows.

responses.note: it not easy to learn all the gadgets

supportLoad.summary: 2 open bugs: 1 LOW (single Time of Day config, 120+ days old in backlog) and 1 unclassified (care level edit on integrated positions, 33 days in Needs Info). No high-severity issues.

positive.text: Heritage exploring Veras HRIS as Paylocity replacement — COO Matt engaged, demo scheduled
Nicolle Williams in new platform oversight role — centralizing decisions, aligning with Veras workflows

negative.text: NPS feedback: 'not easy to learn all the gadgets' and 'harder for staff to read'
Traditions of Hanover showing 0 published shifts in May — may be using workaround
Overtime growing (+20% Apr MoM) despite 18-month platform use

neutral.text: Building autonomy causing budget tracking issues — Nicolle working to standardize
Config session at Chestnut Knoll ended early — planned approach unworkable for floating staff
